records.m_Talk_ENG: This is like rain on your parade...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is like rain on your parade...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is like rain on your parade...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without a cloud in sight...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without a cloud in sight...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without a cloud in sight...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping by the top floor first turned out to be the right choice after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping by the top floor first turned out to be the right choice after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping by the top floor first turned out to be the right choice after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came up all tense, but... can it be really this easy to catch it so anticlimactically?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came up all tense, but... can it be really this easy to catch it so anticlimactically?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came up all tense, but... can it be really this easy to catch it so anticlimactically?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Considering the situation, I guess it's fortunate, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Considering the situation, I guess it's fortunate, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Considering the situation, I guess it's fortunate, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Threat level adjusted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Threat level adjusted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Threat level adjusted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Initiating security protocol for the forced removal of intruders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Initiating security protocol for the forced removal of intruders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Initiating security protocol for the forced removal of intruders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Argh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Argh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Argh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did all those things come from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did all those things come from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did all those things come from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fools! My room is where mental influences are maximized the most within the castle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fools! My room is where mental influences are maximized the most within the castle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fools! My room is where mental influences are maximized the most within the castle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, I can call upon the materialized illusions of the ones I have a strong mental bond with!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, I can call upon the materialized illusions of the ones I have a strong mental bond with!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, I can call upon the materialized illusions of the ones I have a strong mental bond with!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You stand no chance against so many of them! So give up and surrender!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You stand no chance against so many of them! So give up and surrender!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You stand no chance against so many of them! So give up and surrender!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's so much to criticize, it's exhausting! How many annoying faces are there? Just one is bad enough!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's so much to criticize, it's exhausting! How many annoying faces are there? Just one is bad enough!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's so much to criticize, it's exhausting! How many annoying faces are there? Just one is bad enough!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. A true gamer must always have a plan B.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. A true gamer must always have a plan B.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. A true gamer must always have a plan B.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's hope... is crumbling away...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Glad I wasn't too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Glad I wasn't too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Glad I wasn't too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you hurt anywhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you hurt anywhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for the help, but don't you think it's time you started explaining things?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for the help, but don't you think it's time you started explaining things?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for the help, but don't you think it's time you started explaining things?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never mind why the dimensional ship is under the castle, how do you even know my name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never mind why the dimensional ship is under the castle, how do you even know my name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never mind why the dimensional ship is under the castle, how do you even know my name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a bit of a complicated story for me to explain on my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a bit of a complicated story for me to explain on my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a bit of a complicated story for me to explain on my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's discuss the details after meeting the others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's discuss the details after meeting the others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's discuss the details after meeting the others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? There are more people involved?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? There are more people involved?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? There are more people involved?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bell! Mina!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bell! Mina!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bell! Mina!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm back, Goddess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm back, Goddess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm back, Goddess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hestia? Why are you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hestia? Why are you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hestia? Why are you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The manager brought Goddess here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The manager brought Goddess here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The manager brought Goddess here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since there are a lot of materials, she said she needed more people to move it to the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since there are a lot of materials, she said she needed more people to move it to the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since there are a lot of materials, she said she needed more people to move it to the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The manager again...? Who is that person, anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The manager again...? Who is that person, anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The manager again...? Who is that person, anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's unfortunate that you don't have the brainpower to think that far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's unfortunate that you don't have the brainpower to think that far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's unfortunate that you don't have the brainpower to think that far.
